name: github-sync
description: Deep GitHub integration — webhook receiver for PRs, issues, CI status. Bidirectional sync between GitHub and Mycelium tasks/bugs.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Webhook Secret
configSchema.description: GitHub webhook secret for signature verification

configSchema.label: Default Project
configSchema.description: Mycelium project ID for new items from GitHub

configSchema.label: Auto-create Bugs
configSchema.description: Automatically create Mycelium bugs from GitHub issues

configSchema.label: CI Notifications
configSchema.description: Send CI failure notifications to operator inbox
